| STORY-2-005 | 2 | FR-EMPLOYER-002, FR-EMPLOYER-007, FR-EMPLOYER-008, FR-EMPLOYER-009 | OK |

| STORY-3-002 | 3 | FR-EMPLOYEE-001, FR-EMPLOYEE-003, FR-EMPLOYEE-004, FR-EMPLOYEE-005 | OK |
| STORY-3-003 | 3 | FR-SHARED-001, FR-SHARED-002 | OK |
| STORY-3-004 | 3 | FR-SHARED-003, FR-SHARED-004, FR-SHARED-005, FR-SHARED-006, FR-SHARED-007 | OK |
| STORY-3-005 | 3 | FR-DEVOPS-003 | OK |
| STORY-4-001 | 4 | (Infrastructure -- Testnet variant) | FLAGGED |
| STORY-4-002 | 4 | FR-SHARED-007 | OK |
| STORY-4-003 | 4 | (Polish for FR-EMPLOYEE-005, FR-SHARED-007) | FLAGGED |
| STORY-4-004 | 4 | FR-CONTRACT-015, FR-CONTRACT-016, FR-CONTRACT-017, FR-EMPLOYER-010, FR-DEVOPS-004 | OK |
| STORY-4-005 | 4 | (Quality gate -- no new FRs) | FLAGGED |

**Flagged Stories (4):**

1. **STORY-2-001** (Sprint 2): Labeled as "Infrastructure supporting all EMPLOYER FRs" -- sets up types, constants, algorand client, and utilities. While it does not directly implement any FR, it is a prerequisite for all Sprint 2 FR-bearing stories. This is analogous to Sprint 0 scaffolding and is acceptable infrastructure.

2. **STORY-4-001** (Sprint 4): Labeled as "Infrastructure -- Testnet variant of FR-DEVOPS-001, FR-EMPLOYER-001, FR-EMPLOYEE-001." The sprint plan notes the FRs but parenthetically rather than as formal FR references. These FRs are already covered by their primary stories (STORY-1-005, STORY-2-002, STORY-3-002). This story is Testnet deployment polish, which is infrastructure.

3. **STORY-4-003** (Sprint 4): Labeled as "Polish for FR-EMPLOYEE-005, FR-SHARED-007." The sprint plan references FRs parenthetically. These FRs are already primarily covered by STORY-3-002 and STORY-3-004. This story refines existing implementations.

4. **STORY-4-005** (Sprint 4): Labeled as "Quality gate -- no new FRs." This is a demo rehearsal and bug-fix story, which by nature does not introduce new functionality.

**Result: 0 true orphan stories. 4 flagged stories are infrastructure/polish/quality-gate -- all acceptable. PASS**

## CHECK 4 -- Data Model Coverage

**Definition**: Every state key from 03-data-model.md (global + local) must be created or used by at least one story.

### Global State Keys (5 total)

| Key | Type | Created By Story | Used By Stories | Status |
|-----|------|-----------------|-----------------|--------|
| `employer` | Account | STORY-1-002 (`create()`) | STORY-2-002 (role detection), STORY-3-003 (routing) | COVERED |
| `salary_asset` | Asset | STORY-1-002 (`create()`) | STORY-1-001 (ASA creation), STORY-1-003 (withdraw), STORY-2-003 (fund), STORY-2-005 (health) | COVERED |
| `total_employees` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()`) | STORY-1-004 (`remove_employee()`), STORY-2-005 (health/runway) | COVERED |
| `total_streamed` | UInt64 | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()`), STORY-1-004 (`milestone_pay()`) | STORY-2-005 (health analytics) | COVERED |
| `is_paused` | UInt64 | STORY-1-004 (`pause_all()`) | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()` guard), STORY-2-005 (emergency controls), STORY-4-004 (`resume_all()`) | COVERED |

### Local State Keys (5 per employee)

| Key | Type | Created By Story | Used By Stories | Status |
|-----|------|-----------------|-----------------|--------|
| `salary_rate` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()`) | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()`, `get_accrued()`), STORY-1-004 (`update_rate()`), STORY-2-004 (display), STORY-3-001 (accrual calc), STORY-3-002 (rate display) | COVERED |
| `stream_start` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()`) | STORY-1-004 (`resume_stream()`), STORY-3-002 (employment duration display) | COVERED |
| `last_withdrawal` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()`) | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()`, `get_accrued()`), STORY-1-004 (`update_rate()`, `pause_stream()`, `resume_stream()`), STORY-3-001 (accrual calc) | COVERED |
| `total_withdrawn` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()` sets 0) | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()`), STORY-1-004 (`update_rate()`, `pause_stream()`), STORY-3-002 (lifetime display) | COVERED |
| `is_active` | UInt64 | STORY-1-002 (`register_employee()` sets 1) | STORY-1-003 (`withdraw()` guard, overdraft), STORY-1-004 (`pause_stream()`, `resume_stream()`, `remove_employee()`), STORY-2-004 (status display), STORY-3-002 (status badge) | COVERED |

### ASA Schema (PAYUSD Token Metadata)

|----------|-----------------|--------|
| Asset Name ("AlgoFlow USD") | STORY-1-001 | COVERED |
| Unit Name ("PAYUSD") | STORY-1-001 | COVERED |
| Decimals (6) | STORY-1-001 | COVERED |
| Total Supply (1,000,000,000,000) | STORY-1-001 | COVERED |
| Clawback (contract address) | STORY-1-001 | COVERED |

| Key | Used By Story | Status |
|-----|--------------|--------|
| `algoflow:wallet_address` | STORY-2-002 (auto-reconnect) | COVERED |
| `algoflow:wallet_provider` | STORY-2-002 (provider selection) | COVERED |

## VERDICT: PASS

All 47 functional requirements from the PRD are traced to at least one story in the sprint plan. All architecture components and data model keys are covered. The sprint plan provides complete traceability from requirements through stories to implementation components. The project is ready to proceed from Phase P5.
